I lead a data engineering team.
I am in charge of the data platform.
Right now, we are scaling our pipeline.
What do you do? What are you working on?
Hi! I dont think weve met. Im Rachel Carter. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too, Rachel. Im Danilo Febba. I lead a data engineering team.
Great to meet you! Which company are you with, and where are you based?
I work for a tech company based in São Paulo. Im in charge of our whole data pipeline.
Impressive. Im based in Seattle, and I work on the platform side. What are you working on right now?
Right now were scaling our pipeline and deploying a new AI model. Its a big project with many stakeholders.
That sounds exciting. We work with teams like yours. Do you have a tight deadline?
End of the quarter, as always! Lets get in touch — here is my business card.
Perfect. Here is mine too. It was great meeting you, Danilo.
Same here, Rachel. Lets stay in touch after the summit.
Hi, Im Danilo Febba. Nice to meet you.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the International Data and AI Summit here in São Paulo. My name is Helen, and I am one of the event hosts. The opening keynote starts at ten o'clock in the main hall. Throughout the day, we have talks on scaling data pipelines, the future of artificial intelligence, and working with global vendors. Engineering leaders from many countries are here today. Please introduce yourself to new people, share your business card, and build new connections. If you need any help, our team is at the front desk. Have a wonderful summit.
